text: As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 484B.007 to 484B.077 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.003 — Definitions.

As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 484B.007 to 484B.077 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.

subsections.text: As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 484B.007 to 484B.077 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.
